case_title: SANG KYU SHIM VS. JULIA CHOUPROV

docket_entries.description: SC-108 (RECONSIDERATION) REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS). CASE UNDER SUBMISSION. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHIM, SANG KYU AS TO DEFENDANT CHOUPROV, JULIA
ORDER (SC-108A) DATED OCT-15-2008, ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT IS "DENIED".
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-12-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHOUPROV, JULIA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHIM, SANG KYU IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHOUPROV, JULIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-10-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-10-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
